TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == O sefi no niyaro' 部落的會所 == Itiya ho i 'ayaw . o paloma'an no 'Amis a tamdaw . itini i 'apilipilisan ato i 'ato'atolan .o fakeloh ato talod ko sapatireng to loma' nangra . Itiya ira koya inanengay a tomdaw .ci Marang Pawpaw kongangan ningra . i cepo' ko niyaro' ningra . matiya o ci faloco'ay cingra a mikomkom to niyaro' . Lekalen ningra ko polong finawelan no niyaro' . sa niyaro'en no mita ko paloma' .ta masaekong ama rikec kita o polong masa niyaro' sanay cingra . Oya matatood sato a mafolaw ko finawelan . misafaloco' a patireng to paloma'an . mahicera nangra ko makapahay a pala . Tatodong sa ira ko 'alo o pikalangan . mingta to riyar o picekiwan . Sacisowal saan ci Marang Pawpaw . itini to kita a paloma' .so'elinay yo malepon nangra a patireng to kalalikelikel no loma' . patireng to cangra to sefi . malaheci a masanga' nangra koya sefi ira ho ko sowal ni Marang pawpaw . masakapot kita miselal ko polong o fa'inayan no niyaro' . ta mahapingang ko kasa sereserep no kato'as a masakapokapot saan . mi'afatay -ano ira ko sa'opo no finawelan to dadaya . cangra ko cacisikining a misalikat to datong to saka'araw no polong . pakarongay -cangra ko mamifadisaw to sapatala to misetikan no kasakakakaka no masakapotay . Oroma sato mipasifana' ato mikonling cangra to tayal no mi'afatay to demak pakayniay i niyaro . palalanay -cangra ko cacisikining a palalan to sakanga'ay a romakat a tala fonon mi'aw'away-o misimaway cangra to pinaloma . todong caay ka sakasak ko pinaloma a losay . papikedan-cangra ko mico'a'angay to palafoay to niyaro' .todong o 'adipel i salawacan no paloma'an . ano ira ko palafoay a 'ada . cangra ko milekalay to polong finawelan . a milo'is to 'ada . lakeling-cangra ko citodongay to kenaira no finawelan .ano misafafoy misetik .cangra ko ma misilsil to tipid .ano mararaw ko pisilsil nangra to tipid . matefoc no finowelan . mama no kapah -cangra ko midimata'ay to demak no niyaro' . Ano ira komisaloma'ay no niyaro'. tayni i mama no kapah a miteng . ta cipinang cangra a milekal to polong finawelan a ma papadapadang . O mama no kapah ko mikowanay to ciraraway ato tadamaanay a tamdaw . Itiya ho .o kohyak no niyaro' ato sarikec to kapah . o mama no kapah ko citodongay . ano ciraraw ko cimacima no niyaro' . matefoc to kolong , fafoy , 'ayam . kirami , maseti' ko romaromaroma . Malepon ko kapipanayan . i 'ayaw no kailisinan . Maraheker ko faloco' no polong a finawelan no niyaro' a hinatala to pilisin .Mafana' ko ci kawasay a mitangic to kakarayan a misolac to ci adadaay ato mapalesay . O nano ci Marangan misitapang ko matiniay a lekakawa no niyaro' . Ano ciromi'ad ko masaselalay no kapot no fa'inayan .tayra i 'alo a misedef ato milesi' . itira matomes ko kanas to misetikan . Tayra i riyar mifoting ko mama no kapah . mitapal cangra to picelem no kapah . Ano ira ko tadacaayay a kapot . oraan ko mamatefoc hananay kira . Ikor sato mala afedo'ay to no niyaro' ci Marang Pawpaw .itiya keriren ningra ko finawelan no niyaro' a tayra i kadadapidapic no niyaro' a palafang . Pa'araw to kero ato patengil to radiw .Ma lalicay to pi'adop , pi pana' .masasiyay to 'icel a comikay . todong o pisanga'ay to roma a niyaro' . Matini a hatini to ko mihecaan ako .Iraay ho ko sefi no niyaro niyam .Nikaorira .maliyaway to a patireng to 'amoto .ira to ko dahong . caay to katalaw to 'orad ato cidal . Ira ko pita'ongan to sapacakat to mato'asay .Todong o pipalawinaan no harateng .Kita o pangcah aka palasawaden ita ko sefi .Nanay mafana' ko kararerarem to hatiniay a kalekakawa no niyaro' .
S.PHON: == o~u səfi no~u nijaro~uʡ ***** == itija ħo~u i ʡajaw . o~u paɾo~umaʡan no~u ʡamis a tamɬ~ɮaw . itini i ʡapiɾipiɾisan ato~u i ʡato~uʡato~uɾan .o~u fakəɾo~uħ ato~u taɾo~uɬ~ɮ ko~u sapatirəŋ to~u ɾo~umaʡ naŋra . itija ira ko~uja inanəŋaj a to~umɬ~ɮaw .ʦi maraŋ pawpaw ko~uŋaŋan niŋra . i ʦəpo~uʡ ko~u nijaro~uʡ niŋra . matija o~u ʦi faɾo~uʦo~uʡaj ʦiŋra a miko~umko~um to~u nijaro~uʡ . ɾəkaɾən niŋra ko~u po~uɾo~uŋ finawəɾan no~u nijaro~uʡ . sa nijaro~uʡən no~u mita ko~u paɾo~umaʡ .ta masaəko~uŋ ama rikəʦ kita o~u po~uɾo~uŋ masa nijaro~uʡ sanaj ʦiŋra . o~uja matato~uo~uɬ~ɮ sato~u a mafo~uɾaw ko~u finawəɾan . misafaɾo~uʦo~uʡ a patirəŋ to~u paɾo~umaʡan . maħiʦəra naŋra ko~u makapaħaj a paɾa . tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ sa ira ko~u ʡaɾo~u o~u pikaɾaŋan . miŋta to~u rijar o~u piʦəkiwan . saʦiso~uwaɾ saan ʦi maraŋ pawpaw . itini to~u kita a paɾo~umaʡ .so~uʡəɾinaj jo~u maɾəpo~un naŋra a patirəŋ to~u kaɾaɾikəɾikəɾ no~u ɾo~umaʡ . patirəŋ to~u ʦaŋra to~u səfi . maɾaħəʦi a masaŋaʡ naŋra ko~uja səfi ira ħo~u ko~u so~uwaɾ ni maraŋ pawpaw . masakapo~ut kita misəɾaɾ ko~u po~uɾo~uŋ o~u faʡinajan no~u nijaro~uʡ . ta maħapiŋaŋ ko~u kasa sərəsərəp no~u kato~uʡas a masakapo~ukapo~ut saan . miʡafataj -ano~u ira ko~u saʡo~upo~u no~u finawəɾan to~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaja . ʦaŋra ko~u ʦaʦisikiniŋ a misaɾikat to~u ɬ~ɮato~uŋ to~u sakaʡaraw no~u po~uɾo~uŋ . pakaro~uŋaj -ʦaŋra ko~u mamifaɬ~ɮisaw to~u sapataɾa to~u misətikan no~u kasakakakaka no~u masakapo~utaj . o~uro~uma sato~u mipasifanaʡ ato~u miko~unɾiŋ ʦaŋra to~u tajaɾ no~u miʡafataj to~u ɬ~ɮəmak pakajniaj i nijaro~u . paɾaɾanaj -ʦaŋra ko~u ʦaʦisikiniŋ a paɾaɾan to~u sakaŋaʡaj a ro~umakat a taɾa fo~uno~un miʡawʡawaj-o~u misimawaj ʦaŋra to~u pinaɾo~uma . to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ʦaaj ka sakasak ko~u pinaɾo~uma a ɾo~usaj . papikəɬ~ɮan-ʦaŋra ko~u miʦo~uʡaʡaŋaj to~u paɾafo~uaj to~u nijaro~uʡ .to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ o~u ʡaɬ~ɮipəɾ i saɾawaʦan no~u paɾo~umaʡan . ano~u ira ko~u paɾafo~uaj a ʡaɬ~ɮa . ʦaŋra ko~u miɾəkaɾaj to~u po~uɾo~uŋ finawəɾan . a miɾo~uʡis to~u ʡaɬ~ɮa . ɾakəɾiŋ-ʦaŋra ko~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj to~u kənaira no~u finawəɾan .ano~u misafafo~uj misətik .ʦaŋra ko~u ma misiɾsiɾ to~u tipiɬ~ɮ .ano~u mararaw ko~u pisiɾsiɾ naŋra to~u tipiɬ~ɮ . matəfo~uʦ no~u fino~uwəɾan . mama no~u kapaħ -ʦaŋra ko~u miɬ~ɮimataʡaj to~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u nijaro~uʡ . ano~u ira ko~umisaɾo~umaʡaj no~u nijaro~uʡ. tajni i mama no~u kapaħ a mitəŋ . ta ʦipinaŋ ʦaŋra a miɾəkaɾ to~u po~uɾo~uŋ finawəɾan a ma papaɬ~ɮapaɬ~ɮaŋ . o~u mama no~u kapaħ ko~u miko~uwanaj to~u ʦirarawaj ato~u taɬ~ɮamaanaj a tamɬ~ɮaw . itija ħo~u .o~u ko~uħjak no~u nijaro~uʡ ato~u sarikəʦ to~u kapaħ . o~u mama no~u kapaħ ko~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj . ano~u ʦiraraw ko~u ʦimaʦima no~u nijaro~uʡ . matəfo~uʦ to~u ko~uɾo~uŋ , fafo~uj , ʡajam . kirami , masətiʡ ko~u ro~umaro~umaro~uma . maɾəpo~un ko~u kapipanajan . i ʡajaw no~u kaiɾisinan . maraħəkər ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ no~u po~uɾo~uŋ a finawəɾan no~u nijaro~uʡ a ħinataɾa to~u piɾisin .mafanaʡ ko~u ʦi kawasaj a mitaŋiʦ to~u kakarajan a miso~uɾaʦ to~u ʦi aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj ato~u mapaɾəsaj . o~u nano~u ʦi maraŋan misitapaŋ ko~u matiniaj a ɾəkakawa no~u nijaro~uʡ . ano~u ʦiro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ko~u masasəɾaɾaj no~u kapo~ut no~u faʡinajan .tajra i ʡaɾo~u a misəɬ~ɮəf ato~u miɾəsiʡ . itira mato~uməs ko~u kanas to~u misətikan . tajra i rijar mifo~utiŋ ko~u mama no~u kapaħ . mitapaɾ ʦaŋra to~u piʦəɾəm no~u kapaħ . ano~u ira ko~u taɬ~ɮaʦaajaj a kapo~ut . o~uraan ko~u mamatəfo~uʦ ħananaj kira . iko~ur sato~u maɾa afəɬ~ɮo~uʡaj to~u no~u nijaro~uʡ ʦi maraŋ pawpaw .itija kərirən niŋra ko~u finawəɾan no~u nijaro~uʡ a tajra i kaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮapiɬ~ɮapiʦ no~u nijaro~uʡ a paɾafaŋ . paʡaraw to~u kəro~u ato~u patəŋiɾ to~u raɬ~ɮiw .ma ɾaɾiʦaj to~u piʡaɬ~ɮo~up , pi panaʡ .masasijaj to~u ʡiʦəɾ a ʦo~umikaj . to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ o~u pisaŋaʡaj to~u ro~uma a nijaro~uʡ . matini a ħatini to~u ko~u miħəʦaan ako~u .iraaj ħo~u ko~u səfi no~u nijaro~u nijam .nikao~urira .maɾijawaj to~u a patirəŋ to~u ʡamo~uto~u .ira to~u ko~u ɬ~ɮaħo~uŋ . ʦaaj to~u kataɾaw to~u ʡo~uraɬ~ɮ ato~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ . ira ko~u pitaʡo~uŋan to~u sapaʦakat to~u mato~uʡasaj .to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ o~u pipaɾawinaan no~u ħaratəŋ .kita o~u paŋʦaħ aka paɾasawaɬ~ɮən ita ko~u səfi .nanaj mafanaʡ ko~u kararərarəm to~u ħatiniaj a kaɾəkakawa no~u nijaro~uʡ .
S.FORM: == O sefi no niyaro' 部落的會所 == Itiya ho i 'ayaw . o paloma'an no 'Amis a tamdaw . itini i 'apilipilisan ato i 'ato'atolan .o fakeloh ato talod ko sapatireng to loma' nangra . Itiya ira koya inanengay a tomdaw .ci Marang Pawpaw kongangan ningra . i cepo' ko niyaro' ningra . matiya o ci faloco'ay cingra a mikomkom to niyaro' . Lekalen ningra ko polong finawelan no niyaro' . sa niyaro'en no mita ko paloma' .ta masaekong ama rikec kita o polong masa niyaro' sanay cingra . Oya matatood sato a mafolaw ko finawelan . misafaloco' a patireng to paloma'an . mahicera nangra ko makapahay a pala . Tatodong sa ira ko 'alo o pikalangan . mingta to riyar o picekiwan . Sacisowal saan ci Marang Pawpaw . itini to kita a paloma' .so'elinay yo malepon nangra a patireng to kalalikelikel no loma' . patireng to cangra to sefi . malaheci a masanga' nangra koya sefi ira ho ko sowal ni Marang pawpaw . masakapot kita miselal ko polong o fa'inayan no niyaro' . ta mahapingang ko kasa sereserep no kato'as a masakapokapot saan . mi'afatay -ano ira ko sa'opo no finawelan to dadaya . cangra ko cacisikining a misalikat to datong to saka'araw no polong . pakarongay -cangra ko mamifadisaw to sapatala to misetikan no kasakakakaka no masakapotay . Oroma sato mipasifana' ato mikonling cangra to tayal no mi'afatay to demak pakayniay i niyaro . palalanay -cangra ko cacisikining a palalan to sakanga'ay a romakat a tala fonon mi'aw'away-o misimaway cangra to pinaloma . todong caay ka sakasak ko pinaloma a losay . papikedan-cangra ko mico'a'angay to palafoay to niyaro' .todong o 'adipel i salawacan no paloma'an . ano ira ko palafoay a 'ada . cangra ko milekalay to polong finawelan . a milo'is to 'ada . lakeling-cangra ko citodongay to kenaira no finawelan .ano misafafoy misetik .cangra ko ma misilsil to tipid .ano mararaw ko pisilsil nangra to tipid . matefoc no finowelan . mama no kapah -cangra ko midimata'ay to demak no niyaro' . Ano ira komisaloma'ay no niyaro'. tayni i mama no kapah a miteng . ta cipinang cangra a milekal to polong finawelan a ma papadapadang . O mama no kapah ko mikowanay to ciraraway ato tadamaanay a tamdaw . Itiya ho .o kohyak no niyaro' ato sarikec to kapah . o mama no kapah ko citodongay . ano ciraraw ko cimacima no niyaro' . matefoc to kolong , fafoy , 'ayam . kirami , maseti' ko romaromaroma . Malepon ko kapipanayan . i 'ayaw no kailisinan . Maraheker ko faloco' no polong a finawelan no niyaro' a hinatala to pilisin .Mafana' ko ci kawasay a mitangic to kakarayan a misolac to ci adadaay ato mapalesay . O nano ci Marangan misitapang ko matiniay a lekakawa no niyaro' . Ano ciromi'ad ko masaselalay no kapot no fa'inayan .tayra i 'alo a misedef ato milesi' . itira matomes ko kanas to misetikan . Tayra i riyar mifoting ko mama no kapah . mitapal cangra to picelem no kapah . Ano ira ko tadacaayay a kapot . oraan ko mamatefoc hananay kira . Ikor sato mala afedo'ay to no niyaro' ci Marang Pawpaw .itiya keriren ningra ko finawelan no niyaro' a tayra i kadadapidapic no niyaro' a palafang . Pa'araw to kero ato patengil to radiw .Ma lalicay to pi'adop , pi pana' .masasiyay to 'icel a comikay . todong o pisanga'ay to roma a niyaro' . Matini a hatini to ko mihecaan ako .Iraay ho ko sefi no niyaro niyam .Nikaorira .maliyaway to a patireng to 'amoto .ira to ko dahong . caay to katalaw to 'orad ato cidal . Ira ko pita'ongan to sapacakat to mato'asay .Todong o pipalawinaan no harateng .Kita o pangcah aka palasawaden ita ko sefi .Nanay mafana' ko kararerarem to hatiniay a kalekakawa no niyaro' .
S.PHON: == o~u səfi no~u nijaro~uʡ ***** == itija ħo~u i ʡajaw . o~u paɾo~umaʡan no~u ʡamis a tamɬ~ɮaw . itini i ʡapiɾipiɾisan ato~u i ʡato~uʡato~uɾan .o~u fakəɾo~uħ ato~u taɾo~uɬ~ɮ ko~u sapatirəŋ to~u ɾo~umaʡ naŋra . itija ira ko~uja inanəŋaj a to~umɬ~ɮaw .ʦi maraŋ pawpaw ko~uŋaŋan niŋra . i ʦəpo~uʡ ko~u nijaro~uʡ niŋra . matija o~u ʦi faɾo~uʦo~uʡaj ʦiŋra a miko~umko~um to~u nijaro~uʡ . ɾəkaɾən niŋra ko~u po~uɾo~uŋ finawəɾan no~u nijaro~uʡ . sa nijaro~uʡən no~u mita ko~u paɾo~umaʡ .ta masaəko~uŋ ama rikəʦ kita o~u po~uɾo~uŋ masa nijaro~uʡ sanaj ʦiŋra . o~uja matato~uo~uɬ~ɮ sato~u a mafo~uɾaw ko~u finawəɾan . misafaɾo~uʦo~uʡ a patirəŋ to~u paɾo~umaʡan . maħiʦəra naŋra ko~u makapaħaj a paɾa . tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ sa ira ko~u ʡaɾo~u o~u pikaɾaŋan . miŋta to~u rijar o~u piʦəkiwan . saʦiso~uwaɾ saan ʦi maraŋ pawpaw . itini to~u kita a paɾo~umaʡ .so~uʡəɾinaj jo~u maɾəpo~un naŋra a patirəŋ to~u kaɾaɾikəɾikəɾ no~u ɾo~umaʡ . patirəŋ to~u ʦaŋra to~u səfi . maɾaħəʦi a masaŋaʡ naŋra ko~uja səfi ira ħo~u ko~u so~uwaɾ ni maraŋ pawpaw . masakapo~ut kita misəɾaɾ ko~u po~uɾo~uŋ o~u faʡinajan no~u nijaro~uʡ . ta maħapiŋaŋ ko~u kasa sərəsərəp no~u kato~uʡas a masakapo~ukapo~ut saan . miʡafataj -ano~u ira ko~u saʡo~upo~u no~u finawəɾan to~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaja . ʦaŋra ko~u ʦaʦisikiniŋ a misaɾikat to~u ɬ~ɮato~uŋ to~u sakaʡaraw no~u po~uɾo~uŋ . pakaro~uŋaj -ʦaŋra ko~u mamifaɬ~ɮisaw to~u sapataɾa to~u misətikan no~u kasakakakaka no~u masakapo~utaj . o~uro~uma sato~u mipasifanaʡ ato~u miko~unɾiŋ ʦaŋra to~u tajaɾ no~u miʡafataj to~u ɬ~ɮəmak pakajniaj i nijaro~u . paɾaɾanaj -ʦaŋra ko~u ʦaʦisikiniŋ a paɾaɾan to~u sakaŋaʡaj a ro~umakat a taɾa fo~uno~un miʡawʡawaj-o~u misimawaj ʦaŋra to~u pinaɾo~uma . to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ʦaaj ka sakasak ko~u pinaɾo~uma a ɾo~usaj . papikəɬ~ɮan-ʦaŋra ko~u miʦo~uʡaʡaŋaj to~u paɾafo~uaj to~u nijaro~uʡ .to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ o~u ʡaɬ~ɮipəɾ i saɾawaʦan no~u paɾo~umaʡan . ano~u ira ko~u paɾafo~uaj a ʡaɬ~ɮa . ʦaŋra ko~u miɾəkaɾaj to~u po~uɾo~uŋ finawəɾan . a miɾo~uʡis to~u ʡaɬ~ɮa . ɾakəɾiŋ-ʦaŋra ko~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj to~u kənaira no~u finawəɾan .ano~u misafafo~uj misətik .ʦaŋra ko~u ma misiɾsiɾ to~u tipiɬ~ɮ .ano~u mararaw ko~u pisiɾsiɾ naŋra to~u tipiɬ~ɮ . matəfo~uʦ no~u fino~uwəɾan . mama no~u kapaħ -ʦaŋra ko~u miɬ~ɮimataʡaj to~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u nijaro~uʡ . ano~u ira ko~umisaɾo~umaʡaj no~u nijaro~uʡ. tajni i mama no~u kapaħ a mitəŋ . ta ʦipinaŋ ʦaŋra a miɾəkaɾ to~u po~uɾo~uŋ finawəɾan a ma papaɬ~ɮapaɬ~ɮaŋ . o~u mama no~u kapaħ ko~u miko~uwanaj to~u ʦirarawaj ato~u taɬ~ɮamaanaj a tamɬ~ɮaw . itija ħo~u .o~u ko~uħjak no~u nijaro~uʡ ato~u sarikəʦ to~u kapaħ . o~u mama no~u kapaħ ko~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj . ano~u ʦiraraw ko~u ʦimaʦima no~u nijaro~uʡ . matəfo~uʦ to~u ko~uɾo~uŋ , fafo~uj , ʡajam . kirami , masətiʡ ko~u ro~umaro~umaro~uma . maɾəpo~un ko~u kapipanajan . i ʡajaw no~u kaiɾisinan . maraħəkər ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ no~u po~uɾo~uŋ a finawəɾan no~u nijaro~uʡ a ħinataɾa to~u piɾisin .mafanaʡ ko~u ʦi kawasaj a mitaŋiʦ to~u kakarajan a miso~uɾaʦ to~u ʦi aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj ato~u mapaɾəsaj . o~u nano~u ʦi maraŋan misitapaŋ ko~u matiniaj a ɾəkakawa no~u nijaro~uʡ . ano~u ʦiro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ko~u masasəɾaɾaj no~u kapo~ut no~u faʡinajan .tajra i ʡaɾo~u a misəɬ~ɮəf ato~u miɾəsiʡ . itira mato~uməs ko~u kanas to~u misətikan . tajra i rijar mifo~utiŋ ko~u mama no~u kapaħ . mitapaɾ ʦaŋra to~u piʦəɾəm no~u kapaħ . ano~u ira ko~u taɬ~ɮaʦaajaj a kapo~ut . o~uraan ko~u mamatəfo~uʦ ħananaj kira . iko~ur sato~u maɾa afəɬ~ɮo~uʡaj to~u no~u nijaro~uʡ ʦi maraŋ pawpaw .itija kərirən niŋra ko~u finawəɾan no~u nijaro~uʡ a tajra i kaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮapiɬ~ɮapiʦ no~u nijaro~uʡ a paɾafaŋ . paʡaraw to~u kəro~u ato~u patəŋiɾ to~u raɬ~ɮiw .ma ɾaɾiʦaj to~u piʡaɬ~ɮo~up , pi panaʡ .masasijaj to~u ʡiʦəɾ a ʦo~umikaj . to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ o~u pisaŋaʡaj to~u ro~uma a nijaro~uʡ . matini a ħatini to~u ko~u miħəʦaan ako~u .iraaj ħo~u ko~u səfi no~u nijaro~u nijam .nikao~urira .maɾijawaj to~u a patirəŋ to~u ʡamo~uto~u .ira to~u ko~u ɬ~ɮaħo~uŋ . ʦaaj to~u kataɾaw to~u ʡo~uraɬ~ɮ ato~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ . ira ko~u pitaʡo~uŋan to~u sapaʦakat to~u mato~uʡasaj .to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ o~u pipaɾawinaan no~u ħaratəŋ .kita o~u paŋʦaħ aka paɾasawaɬ~ɮən ita ko~u səfi .nanaj mafanaʡ ko~u kararərarəm to~u ħatiniaj a kaɾəkakawa no~u nijaro~uʡ .
